message:
fix(types): fix TypeScript strictness errors in gateway and web

- Fix index signature access errors in test files (use bracket notation)
- Fix array index access errors with non-null assertions
- Fix optional property assignment with conditional spreads
- Fix undefined property handling with nullish coalescing

Error count: 378 -> 298 (80 errors fixed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -131,7 +131,7 @@ export function useDashboard(
           {
             id: dashboard.id,
             name: dashboard.name,
-            description: dashboard.description,
+            description: dashboard.description ?? "",
             ownerId: dashboard.ownerId,
             visibility: dashboard.sharing.visibility,
             widgetCount: dashboard.widgets.length,
